content: {"file": "frontend/storyforge-ui/src/app/pages/clarify/clarify.component.ts", "summary": "This component handles the loading and submission of clarification questions for a job in an assessment process. It fetches questions from a service, allows users to input answers, and submits those answers back to the service.", "rules": [{"name": "Load Questions", "description": "Loads clarification questions for a specific job ID.", "conditions": ["jobId is set"], "actions": ["Call storyForgeService.getAssessmentStatus with jobId", "Set loading state", "Populate questions and initial answers"]}, {"name": "Submit Answers", "description": "Submits user-provided answers to the service.", "conditions": ["canSubmit returns true", "submitting is false"], "actions": ["Call storyForgeService.submitClarificationAnswers with jobId and answers", "Navigate to status page on success", "Set submitError on failure"]}], "dependencies": ["@angular/common", "@angular/forms", "@angular/router", "../../services/storyforge.service"]}
